name: WooCommerce
description: WooCommerce is an open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress providing a REST API to manage online stores. Agents can programmatically manage products, orders, customers, coupons, and reports on any WooCommerce-powered site.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products from the WooCommerce store. Supports filtering by status, category, tag, SKU, search term, and price range.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new product in the WooCommerce store with name, type, regular price, description, categories, images, and stock management settings.

capabilities.name: list_orders
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders from the WooCommerce store. Supports filtering by status, customer, product, date ranges, and search terms.

capabilities.name: update_order
capabilities.description: Update an existing order's status, customer note, billing/shipping addresses, or metadata. Commonly used to transition orders through fulfillment stages.

capabilities.name: list_customers
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers from the WooCommerce store. Supports filtering by email, role, search term, and ordering by various fields.

capabilities.name: create_coupon
capabilities.description: Create a new discount coupon with a code, discount type, amount, usage limits, expiry date, and product/category restrictions.

capabilities.name: get_sales_report
capabilities.description: Retrieve sales reports with totals for a given date range. Returns total sales, net sales, total orders, total items, total tax, and total shipping.
